description: Educational content showcasing the coffee roasting journey, emphasizing how temperature control and timing at each stage shapes flavor development and quality.
structural_recipe: Show the coffee roasting progression through visual stages (green beans → roasted beans). Use Arabic captions explaining each phase's importance. Focus on sensory details (temperature, aroma, color changes). Include behind-the-scenes footage or close-ups of beans transforming. End with a call to quality appreciation rather than direct sales.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences value craftsmanship and heritage narratives, especially around coffee culture. Breaking down a traditional process into educational steps builds perceived expertise and trust. The gradual transformation narrative aligns with appreciation for precision and attention to detail in premium product positioning.
transplantation_caveats: Requires authentic knowledge of roasting to avoid credibility loss among coffee enthusiasts
Must balance educational tone with entertainment to maintain engagement beyond specialty coffee followers
Technical Arabic terminology should be accessible to general audience, not just professionals
